title: Granite Replacement Pestle,Only Pestle [Mortar is not Included] Dark Gray Unpolished
description:
About this item
Made of natural granite。
Made of unpolished granite, which is inherently durable and heavy, therefore, will not slip on your kitchen counters.
Granite replacement pestle is 5.3 in long and 1.58 in diameter.
Suitable for making sauces,such as fresh mustard, guacamole, pesto, salsa, chutneys and more.
This product can be given as a great gift for your friends and families. they will be very happy.
